1.description: Fetch Kristiansand municipality boundary and names

2.description: Fetch 200-year storm-surge areas intersecting Kristiansand municipality

4.description: Filter buildings within 50 metres of storm-surge areas

5.description: Calculate distance from each building to nearest storm-surge area

6.description: Join municipality and county names to building results

7.description: Sort buildings by distance to storm-surge areas (ascending)

replan_trigger.error: Step 1 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).

args.sql:
SELECT
    kommunenummer,
    kommunenavn,
    fylkesnummer,
    fylkesnavn,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom, 4326))::json->>'geometry' AS geom_geojson
FROM
    <table_name>
WHERE
    kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

SELECT
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom, 4326))::json->>'geometry' AS geom_geojson
FROM
    <table_name>
WHERE
    stormflo_klasse = '200'
    AND ST_Intersects(geom, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('<kristiansand_geom>'), 4326), <table_srid>));

SELECT
    byggid,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom, 4326))::json->>'geometry' AS geom_geojson
FROM
    <table_name>
WHERE
    ST_Intersects(geom, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('<kristiansand_geom>'), 4326), <table_srid>));

raw_args.sql:
SELECT
    kommunenummer,
    kommunenavn,
    fylkesnummer,
    fylkesnavn,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom, 4326))::json->>'geometry' AS geom_geojson
FROM
